lines.speaker: Cb
lines.text: What... the... fu--

lines.speaker: Aj
lines.text: BABY RUN AWAY! SAVE YOURSELF!

lines.speaker: Klat Yeknom
lines.text: MUAHAHAHAHAHA!

lines.speaker: Klat Yeknom
lines.text: The other half has FINALLY arrived... just in time.

lines.speaker: Cb
lines.text: KLAT YEKNOM!

lines.speaker: Cb
lines.text: Release my baby at once!

lines.speaker: Klat Yeknom
lines.text: MUAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA!

lines.speaker: Klat Yeknom
lines.text: FOOL!

lines.speaker: Klat Yeknom
lines.text: Don't you see that you have fallen for my trap?

lines.speaker: Klat Yeknom
lines.text: The only way to satisfy my hunger is to consume a romantic couple that had a fight.

lines.speaker: Klat Yeknom
lines.text: The moment you and your boyfriend faught, was the moment that sealed your fate.

lines.speaker: Klat Yeknom
lines.text: You are nothing more than food!

lines.speaker: Klat Yeknom
lines.text: I ordered my little minions to capture your boyfriend, knowing damn well that you would come running after him.

lines.speaker: Klat Yeknom
lines.text: And here you are, right in front of my doorstep.

lines.speaker: Klat Yeknom
lines.text: Now both you AND your little *baby* are here for me to feast!

lines.speaker: Klat Yeknom
lines.text: MUAHAHAHAHAHA!

lines.speaker: Klat Yeknom
lines.text: Once I'm full with you two, I'll go back to my nice slumber, waiting for the next arguing couple to fill my belly up again.

lines.speaker: Cb
lines.text: Well jokes on you Klat Yeknom!

lines.speaker: Cb
lines.text: You won't be needing a feast to go to sleep.

lines.speaker: Cb
lines.text: Becauses I'll put you to sleep myself! With my COOKIE BLASTER!

lines.speaker: Klat Yeknom
lines.text: Then bring it on then Cb! Show me how far you would go to save your pathetic boyfriend!

lines.speaker: Cb
lines.text: BRING IT ON!

lines.speaker: Aj
lines.text: BABY! WATCH OUT HE'S GOING TO THROW ROCKS! JUMP OVER THEM OKAY?
